chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَنِيِّ وَ الْمَذْيِ يُصِيبَانِ الثَّوْبَ وَ الْجَسَدَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 35 – The semen and the seminal fluid both hit the clothes and the body

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/155)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/155)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمَذْيِ يُصِيبُ الثَّوْبَ قَالَ لَيْسَ بِهِ بَأْسٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the seminal fluid hitting the clothes. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem with it’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn abu Hamzah from abu Basir who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about al-Madhiy (the pre-seminal fluid) which pollutes one’s clothes. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not harmful.’”
